avatarScaling.title: Kugena Ingano ya Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Uburyo bwa VRChat bwo kugena uburebure biciye kuri OSC — bikora kuri avatar iyo ari yo yose
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Utubuto vyo vyihuse bikora hose (naho VRChat yaba ari yo ikoreshwa). Igihe urufunguzo rudashoboye gufatwa, urashobora gukoresha akaboya kari hejuru.
translator.title: Umusemuzi
translator.aiGrammarFix: Gutunganya Grammaire hakiri kare ukoresheje AI (bikoresha utanga serivisi wa IntelliChat wo hejuru)
translator.note: Bikoreshwa n'igenamiterere ryo gusemura mu Chatbox ya Live Typing, na hose ahandi mu porogaramu aho hatangwa uburyo bwo "Gusemura imbere yo kurungika."
liveTyping.title: Kwandika mu Kanya nyene
liveTyping.subtitle: birungikwa uko wandika, nk'uko Chatbox ya VRChat ubwayo ibikora
liveTyping.placeholder: Andikira ng'aha — ibi birarungikwa mu Chatbox mu buryo bwikoraga buri masegonda make uko uriko wandika. Komeza wandike urenze inyuguti 144; VRChat izokwerekana '…' hamwe n'iherezo ry'ubutumwa bwawe.
liveTyping.translateLabel: Semura imbere yo kurungika (bikoresha igenamiterere ry'Umusemuzi)
languagePicker.title: Hitamwo ururimi rwawe
languagePicker.subtitle: Urashobora guhindura ibi nyuma mu Igenamiterere.
settingsLanguage.title: Ururimi
settingsLanguage.label: Ururimi rwa Porogaramu
